response.justification: While Bogdan brings 20 years of solid engineering experience and strong multi-stack technical chops, the role requires demonstrated AI/ML expertise and director-level strategic leadership. His AI work is limited to a one-month engagement at Stripe with no prior AI/ML background, published research, or track record of building AI-powered products. He lacks the advanced degree in AI (preferred) and shows staff-level rather than principal/director-level strategic impact.
strengths: Exceeds minimum 15-year experience requirement with 20 years across web, mobile, desktop, and infrastructure domains
Demonstrates strong software craftsmanship discipline with deep testing/TDD focus and multi-language fluency across JavaScript, TypeScript, D, C++, and more
Evidence of mentoring and knowledge-sharing through workshops, open-source contributions, and community engagement
concerns: AI/ML expertise is critically absent—only one month of exposure to AI infrastructure at Stripe with no foundational ML background or education
No demonstrated track record of building AI-powered products, platforms, or solutions; no recognized industry expertise in AI
Staff-level roles show senior technical capability but lack evidence of director-level strategic decision-making and organizational influence needed for principal engineer role
